listing.title: Uplift V2 commercial standing desk
listing.why_ranked: Use FlexiSpot's lower price to ask for $205.

conversation.speaker: Daniel
conversation.text: Yes, it's still available. I can do $240 if you pick it up today.
Thanks — I'm comparing a few similar desks nearby before deciding.

conversation.speaker: Daniel
conversation.text: No problem. Let me know — I have someone else asking too.

next_move.headline: Goti's next move
next_move.plain_english: Another seller already gave us $195, so $205 is firm but reasonable.
next_move.draft: Thanks — I'm interested, but I have another similar desk nearby at $195. If you can do $205 and pickup today, I can come by this afternoon.
next_move.listing_summary: Uplift V2 commercial standing desk · Facebook Marketplace · asking $240
